title: brachyscome assamica
intro: Brachyscome assamica, also known as the Button Heath, is a flowering plant native to Australia that belongs to the daisy family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Brachyscome assamica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune system function. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile option for those looking to harness its medicinal properties in herbal preparations.
